scripts.deploy:backend: cd functions && npm install && cd .. && serverless deploy --aws-profile default
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && aws s3 sync frontend/dist s3://$npm_package_config_s3Bucket --delete --profile $npm_package_config_awsProfile && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $npm_package_config_cfDistId --paths "/*" --profile $npm_package_config_awsProfile
